leads.needVendorAccountDesc: You need a vendor account to view this page.

payouts.needSignInDesc: Please sign in to view your payouts.
payouts.title: My Payouts
payouts.subtitle: Track your earnings and payout disbursements
payouts.emptyDesc: Payouts are processed after your bookings are completed and the escrow period ends.
payouts.scheduleBullet1: Payouts are initiated 48 hours after your event is marked complete by the customer.
payouts.scheduleBullet2: Funds arrive in your registered bank account within 3–5 business days.
payouts.scheduleBullet3: Platform fees of 5–10% are deducted before disbursement.

insights.title: Insights
insights.subtitle: How couples are finding and responding to your profile.
insights.emptyLeads: Lead insights will appear here once couples start reaching out.

reviews.subtitleWithAvg: {avg} average across {total, plural, one {# review} other {# reviews}} — replying builds trust with future couples.
reviews.subtitleEmpty: Replies to reviews build trust with future couples.
